'''mashaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mcguinnessite|mcguinnessite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-sh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mcguinnessite|mcguinnessite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mashaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæshæbæth|mæshæbæth]] || [[word:mæshæbæj|mæshæbæj]] || [[word:mæshæbæsh|mæshæbæsh]] || [[word:mæshæbæ|mæshæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mashashabath|mashashabath]] || [[word:mashashabaj|mashashabaj]] || [[word:mashashabash|mashashabash]] || [[word:mashashaba|mashashaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mashabath|mashabath]] || [[word:mashabaj|mashabaj]] || [[word:mashabash|mashabash]] || [[word:mashaba|mashaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mashafbath|mashafbath]] || [[word:mashafbaj|mashafbaj]] || [[word:mashafbash|mashafbash]] || [[word:mashafbaf|mashafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mashabatha|mashabatha]] || [[word:mashabaja|mashabaja]] || [[word:mashabasha|mashabasha]] || [[word:mashabaka|mashabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mashabath|mashabath]] || [[word:mashabaj|mashabaj]] || [[word:mashabash|mashabash]] || [[word:mashaba|mashaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mashabathal|mashabathal]] || [[word:mashabajal|mashabajal]] || [[word:mashabashal|mashabashal]] || [[word:mashabakal|mashabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mashabathatha|mashabathatha]] || [[word:mashabajaja|mashabajaja]] || [[word:mashabashasha|mashabashasha]] || [[word:mashabaka|mashabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mashabathan|mashabathan]] || [[word:mashabajan|mashabajan]] || [[word:mashabashan|mashabashan]] || [[word:mashabakan|mashabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mashabathaoro|mashabathaoro]] || [[word:mashabajaoro|mashabajaoro]] || [[word:mashabashaoro|mashabashaoro]] || [[word:mashabakaoro|mashabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
